title: Connected TV Testing title change (OTT Ads)
description: Reach audiences on streaming platforms with targeted TV advertising.

value.title: Connected TV | OTT
value.subtitle: Capture the attention of a streaming audience with dynamic video ads.

value.title: Connected TV +Over-The-Top Advertising
value.description: Connected TV (CTV) and Over-The-Top video (OTT) advertising allows you to make an impact with stunning video ads. Target TV streaming audiences on popular channels like ESPN, CNN, and Fox. These non-skippable ads are designed to leave a lasting impression and keep you top-of-mind.

value.title: Make an Impact With Connected TV and Over-The-Top Advertising
value.description: CTV/OTT advertising stands out in the marketing landscape by delivering compelling brand experiences to audiences captivated by streaming services. CTV/OTT ads are non-skippable ensuring that every CTV/OTT campaign achieves maximum visibility and meaningful results. Add CTV/OTT to existing efforts such as Social Media Advertising, Google Business Profile, or Pay-Per-Click efforts for a well-rounded multichannel strategy.

value.title: Why Connected TV Advertising Works
value.description: Combine the impact of TV with the precision of digital advertising.

features.title: Premium Placement
features.description: Your ads appear on popular streaming platforms like Hulu, Roku, Fire TV, and more, right alongside premium content from major networks and studios.

features.title: Precise Targeting
features.description: Target by demographics, interests, location, viewing habits, and more. Reach exactly who you want, when you want, with zero waste.

features.title: Non-Skippable Impact
features.description: Unlike YouTube ads, CTV ads can't be skipped. Your message gets seen, every time, on the biggest screen in the home.

features.title: Measurable Results
features.description: Track impressions, completion rates, website visits, and conversions. Know exactly what's working and optimize in real-time.

value.title: How Connected TV Advertising Works
value.description: From strategy to results, we handle everything to make your CTV campaign a success.

cards.title: Strategy & Targeting
cards.description: We identify your ideal audience and create a targeting strategy to reach them across streaming platforms.

cards.title: Creative Development
cards.description: We produce high-quality video ads optimized for streaming platforms, or adapt your existing TV commercials.

cards.title: Campaign Launch
cards.description: Your ads go live across premium streaming networks, reaching your target audience during their favorite shows.

cards.title: Tracking & Optimization
cards.description: We monitor performance, track results, and continuously optimize to maximize your exposure and campaign effectiveness.

value.title: Advertise Across Premium Streaming Platforms
value.description: Your ads appear on the platforms your customers are already watching.

value.title: Connected TV Advertising FAQs
value.description: Get answers to common questions about CTV advertising.

faqs.question: What is Connected TV (CTV) advertising?
faqs.answer: Connected TV advertising delivers video ads to viewers watching streaming content on internet-connected devices like smart TVs, Roku, Fire TV, Apple TV, and gaming consoles. It's TV advertising for the streaming age.

faqs.question: How is CTV different from traditional TV advertising?
faqs.answer: CTV offers precise targeting, real-time tracking, and measurable results that traditional TV can't provide. You can target specific audiences, track who saw your ad, and measure conversions, all at a fraction of traditional TV costs.

faqs.question: What platforms will my ads appear on?
faqs.answer: Your ads can appear on major streaming platforms like Hulu, Peacock, Paramount+, Pluto TV, and more, as well as across devices like Roku, Fire TV, Apple TV, and smart TVs.

value.title: We Put Local Brands on the Map
value.description: Our network spans across {city}'s most popular neighborhoods and venues
